name: OmopDiagnosticReportMeasurementView
title: DiagnosticReport → measurement (flat)
description: When a DiagnosticReport's LOINC code resolves to an OMOP concept with domain_id = Measurement, the report itself produces one or more measurement rows. Each conclusionCode entry generates a separate row. This is independent of the Observation results referenced by DiagnosticReport.result[], which are mapped by the Observation mapper. Lab panel codes (e.g. 24323-8 Comprehensive metabolic panel) are the primary Measurement-domain codes.

column.name: person_id
column.description: Resolve Patient/{id} reference to integer person_id. Skip row if unresolvable.

column.name: measurement_concept_id
column.description: LOINC code looked up in OMOP vocabulary. Must have domain_id = Measurement. Use first LOINC coding found. 0 if concept not found.

column.name: measurement_date
column.description: Date component of effectiveDateTime, or effectivePeriod.start. Skip row if absent (ETL-German behavior).

column.name: measurement_datetime
column.description: Full timestamp from effectiveDateTime or effectivePeriod.start.

column.name: measurement_type_concept_id
column.description: ETL-German maps category via SOURCE_VOCABULARY_ID_DIAGNOSTIC_REPORT_CATEGORY custom concept map. Common defaults: 32817 (EHR) or 32856 (Lab result).

column.name: value_as_concept_id
column.description: SNOMED conclusion code resolved to OMOP concept. ETL-German currently stores this in measurement_source_concept_id instead.

column.name: provider_id
column.description: First performer reference resolved to provider_id. Also consider resultsInterpreter[0].

column.name: measurement_source_value
column.description: Verbatim SNOMED code from conclusionCode. ETL-German uses this field.

column.name: measurement_source_concept_id
column.description: SNOMED conclusionCode resolved to OMOP concept ID. ETL-German stores the SNOMED concept here (line 339).

column.name: value_source_value
column.description: Verbatim SNOMED code. ETL-German stores this (line 344).

where.description: DiagnosticReport.code (LOINC) resolves to OMOP concept with domain_id = Measurement
